channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Actors Brittany Allen and Jeff Kober Self-Submit for Emmy Noms After Being Overlooked by HBO Max
item.description: Brittany Allen and Jeff Kober, guest stars of HBO Max’s medical drama 'The Pitt,' secured Emmy nominations after self-submitting their performances when the network initially excluded them from its of...

item.title: Moana live-action remake criticized for lacklustre performance and heavy reliance on CGI
item.description: The live-action remake of Disney's 2016 animated hit Moana has been met with criticism for its lacklustre execution and overreliance on CGI. While Dwayne Johnson reprises his role as the demigod Maui,...

item.title: The History and Artistry of Fordite: A Byproduct of Industrial Innovation
item.description: Fordite, also known as Detroit agate, is a unique gemstone formed by the accidental accumulation of paint overspray from mid-century automotive factories. Created between the 1920s and 1960s, this mat...

item.title: NSW Wins State of Origin Decider at Suncorp Despite Queensland's Struggles
item.description: New South Wales (NSW) have pulled off a stunning victory in the 2026 State of Origin decider, defeating a disjointed Queensland side at Suncorp Stadium. Led by halfback Nathan Cleary, the Blues overca...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial Day 3: Cross-Examination of NBI Agent and Zuleika Lopez's Testimony
item.description: The third day of the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte saw the defense team cross-examining a prosecution witness regarding digital evidence related to alleged grave threats against Pre...

item.title: Small presses are outshining Big Five in literary awards
item.description: The article explores how small Australian publishers are increasingly dominating major literary awards, such as the Miles Franklin and Stella Prize, despite being overshadowed by the 'Big Five' publis...

item.title: Tanzania and Afreximbank Partner for Economic Growth via Affordable Finance
item.description: Tanzania has formed a strategic partnership with the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) to mobilize over one billion US dollars in investment capital, supporting sectors like manufacturing, infr...

item.title: Deputy Speaker Exposes Verification Gaps in Government Agency Claims
item.description: Deputy Speaker Benjamin Kalu revealed he was duped into meeting an alleged PFIPC DG after receiving a letter with the Presidency’s letterhead. The document appeared official with the Federal Secretari...

item.title: 2026 Emmy Nominations Highlight The Pitt and Hacks' Dominance
item.description: The 78th Primetime Emmy Awards nominations for 2026 have been announced, with HBO Max's 'The Pitt' leading all nominees with 25 nods, while 'Hacks' tops comedies with 24. 'The Pitt,' a sophomore drama...

item.title: South African Monarchs to Address Regional Migration Tensions with Zimbabwean Leader
item.description: The article details the initiative led by King Ndamase of AmaMpondo to engage regional leaders and address migration tensions between South Africa and Zimbabwe. Ndamase, acting chair of the Kings Foru...

item.title: Overcoming a Sexless Marriage: A Journey to Rekindling Intimacy
item.description: Tess and Craig, a couple in their late 50s, experienced a significant decline in their sexual relationship over three decades. After having children and entering perimenopause, Tess struggled with a l...

item.title: ED Freezes Trinamool Congress Bank Accounts Over Alleged Financial Irregularities
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has frozen three bank accounts of the Trinamool Congress (TMC), holding deposits worth Rs 440 crore, under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act. The party accused th...

item.title: Tanzania's Current Account Deficit Expands Due to Rising Import Costs
item.description: Tanzania's current account deficit expanded by 40% year-on-year to $2.91 billion in May 2026, driven by soaring import costs from global geopolitical tensions and elevated freight charges. This contra...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial, Flood Control Allegations, and Unemployment Data
item.description: The article covers key developments in the Philippines on July 8, 2026. Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial continues with her defense team arguing that her alleged grave threats against F...

item.title: Analysts Dispute Trump's $19.2 Trillion Manufacturing Investment Claim
item.description: President Donald Trump's assertion during a NATO summit press conference that the U.S. had invested $19.2 trillion in manufacturing plants and equipment faced sharp criticism from political analysts a...

item.title: Study Reveals Banned Toxic Chemicals Found in Recycled Plastics Used for Children’s Products
item.description: A University of Cape Town (UCT) study has uncovered traces of banned toxic chemicals in various children's products sold in South Africa, raising serious concerns about product safety. The research, l...

item.title: Anjelica Huston's 1960s Modeling Career and Transition to Acting
item.description: This article explores the early career of Anjelica Huston during the late 1960s, highlighting her rise as a high-fashion model before transitioning to acting. Born in 1951, Huston's unique aristocrati...

item.title: Zanzibar's Political Parties Sign Reconciliation Accord to Promote Unity
item.description: Zanzibar is set to witness a significant political development as President Dr Hussein Mwinyi is expected to preside over the signing of a reconciliation agreement between the ruling Chama Cha Mapindu...

item.title: Northern Governors and Traditional Rulers Discuss Regional Security Strategies in Kaduna
item.description: Northern Nigeria Governors’ Forum and Traditional Rulers’ Council held a joint meeting in Kaduna to address pressing security challenges facing the region. The gathering aimed to identify practical so...

item.title: State of Origin controversy erupts over disputed try decision
item.description: The NSW Blues secured a crucial State of Origin Series victory after a contentious try decision involving Jack Bostock and Bradman Best. The match, played at Suncorp Stadium, saw intense debate over w...
